case_title: BEIDUO LI VS. MATT PITTMAN et al

docket_entries.description: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR JESUS FERNANDEZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, BEIDUO
RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, JESUS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MATT PITTMAN, JESUS FERNANDEZ ON AUG-26-2013 - DENIED. "JESUS FERNANDEZ IS PRESENT IN COURT BUT IS NOT A PARTY TO THIS LAWSUIT; BUT HAS THE SAME NAME AS THE JESUS FERNANDEZ AGAINST WHOM A JUDGMENT WAS OBTAINED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WHO APPEARED AT THE HEARING IS NOT THE NAMED DEFENDANT, ALTHOUGH HE HAD THE SAME NAME AS THE DEFENDANT AND LIVES AT THE SAME ADDRESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, BEIDUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PITTMAN, MATT FERNANDEZ, JESUS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
